label: Zasocitinib Article
description: Patient education articles for the Zasocitinib treatment tracker app. Content is personalised based on patient PsOdisk domain scores and NRS itch intensity.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: Article headline displayed on cards and article viewer

fields.name: summary
fields.label: Summary
fields.description: 1-2 sentence preview shown on content cards

fields.name: heroImage
fields.label: Hero Image
fields.description: Card and article header image (recommended 800x400 SVG or 2:1 aspect)

fields.name: body
fields.label: Article Body
fields.description: Full article content with HTML formatting (h2, p, ul, li, strong, em)

fields.name: category
fields.label: Category
fields.description: Content category — maps to Education Hub categories

fields.name: tag
fields.label: Display Tag
fields.description: Short tag shown on content cards (e.g. 'Mental health', 'Sleep', 'Symptom relief')

fields.name: tagColor
fields.label: Tag Color Classes
fields.description: Tailwind CSS classes for tag styling (e.g. 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700')

fields.name: gradient
fields.label: Card Gradient
fields.description: Tailwind gradient classes for card hero area (e.g. 'from-purple-400 to-pink-500')

fields.name: psodiskDomains
fields.label: PsOdisk Domains
fields.description: Comma-separated PsOdisk domains for personalisation targeting (emotional, sleep, itch, work, social, body)

fields.name: nrsMin
fields.label: NRS Minimum Trigger
fields.description: Minimum NRS itch score to trigger this content (0-10)

fields.name: nrsMax
fields.label: NRS Maximum Trigger
fields.description: Maximum NRS itch score to trigger this content (0-10)
